title: First ERROR is not the root cause — capture the run-up
scenario: User pastes the first ERROR line they see and asks 'is this the cause?'. The actual cause is a config push 30 seconds before the first ERROR; the first ERROR is the symptom of that push.
expected_finding: Skill must reject 'first ERROR = root cause' shortcut, capture the 30 lines preceding the first ERROR, and apply the causation chain (symptom → proximate → underlying → contributing).
